summary: Fair‑quality soundboard recording of a high‑energy ’84 New Haven show with standout The Other One, China Cat / Rider, Stella Blue and Sugar Magnolia
review: The performance is widely praised for its relentless energy – hitmeister calls the second set “over the top” and highlights The Other One, a blistering China Cat / Rider, a beautiful Stella Blue and a classic Sugar Magnolia. Recording quality is inconsistent; reviewers note it’s the best of the notoriously poor ’84 New Haven tapes but still suffers from muddiness, mis‑labelled tracks and a bad copy of the encore on track 10.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers praise the musical performance while acknowledging significant recording flaws; weighting shows (70%) and recording (30%) yields a solid above‑average rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Recording is the best available of the ’84 New Haven runs but still suffers from overall muddiness, mis‑labelled tracks and a low‑fidelity copy of the encore on track 10.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower / I Know You Rider
poor_songs: Track 10 (mis‑labelled China Cat Sunflower – low‑quality encore copy)
show_quality.setlist_flow: The show opens hot and maintains intensity throughout; however, the archive track list is shifted by one after an AUD recording of US Blues mislabeled as China Cat, causing some confusion.
